compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## What

Purge STALE present-tense bash-engine/bash-seam language from CI comments and the
`_commands` package module docstrings. These describe machinery that no longer exists:
the bash test-suite collector was removed, and the bash write seam was retired in Tier D
(`_seam.append_event`'s OWN function docstring already says: "Tier D retired the bash
seam; `rebar._store` is the sole write core") — yet several MODULE docstrings and CI
comments still assert the bash path in present tense, contradicting reality.

Verified stale spots (each confirmed against `origin/main`):
1. `.github/workflows/test.yml:8` — comment references "standalone bash suite under
   `tests/scripts/test-*.sh`, which the `test_bash_suites.py` collector runs" — BOTH the
   collector and `tests/scripts/test-*.sh` are GONE (verified: no such files).
2. `.github/workflows/external-integration.yml:45` — comment claims the fixture
   "initializes a git-backed store via the bash engine, which shells out to jq + git".
   The engine is Python/in-process now. Reword the comment (do NOT silently drop the jq
   install unless verified unused — reword its justification instead).
3. `src/rebar/_commands/leaf.py:1-9` — the WHOLE module docstring (not just line 9) is
   stale: it claims the functions are "reached behind `REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=python`" and
   "append through the bash write seam (`_seam.append_event` → `ticket-append-event.sh` →
   `write_commit_event`) so the locked write path is unchanged until Tier D", and "the
   per-command bash suite passes against either implementation". All retired.
4. `src/rebar/_commands/_seam.py:1-11` — the MODULE docstring still says appends route
   "through ONE narrow seam — the bash `ticket-append-event.sh` wrapping
   `write_commit_event`" and "Python writes route through the bash core so invariant I5
   holds", directly contradicting THIS FILE's own `append_event` docstring. (Discovered
   during plan review; added to scope.)
5. `src/rebar/_commands/__init__.py:1-10` — references the "`ticket-commands.py` engine
   entrypoint) when `REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=python`" bash dispatcher path. (Discovered during
   plan review; added to scope.)

**Out of scope (deliberately NOT purged):** `src/rebar/_store/event_append.py:4` and
`src/rebar/_store/lock.py:7,22` reference the bash core as documented lineage / the
`docs/bash-migration.md §6` dual-window interop rule — these are historical/interop
references, not stale present-tense claims, and are left as-is. Legitimate references to
`docs/bash-migration.md` as a HISTORICAL record are kept everywhere.

## Scope
Reword each of the five stale spots to describe the CURRENT in-process reality (writes go
through `rebar._store.event_append.write_and_push`; the Python tiers + pytest layout for
tests), keeping any legitimate historical `bash-migration.md` citation. Do not change
behavior — comments/docstrings only.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `test.yml` comment no longer references the removed `test_bash_suites.py` collector
      or `tests/scripts/test-*.sh`; it describes the current pytest layout.
- [ ] `external-integration.yml` comment no longer claims a "bash engine … shells out to
      jq"; the jq step's justification is reworded (jq kept only if still used).
- [ ] The `_commands` module docstrings (leaf.py, _seam.py, __init__.py) describe the
      current in-process `rebar._store` write path, consistent with `_seam.append_event`.
- [ ] **Completeness proof (in-session, single command):**
      `grep -rn 'REBAR_LEAF_WRITES\|ticket-append-event.sh\|per-command bash suite\|route through the bash core\|test_bash_suites\|bash engine' src/rebar/_commands .github/workflows/test.yml .github/workflows/external-integration.yml`
      returns NOTHING (all five stale spots purged; `_store` lineage refs are outside this
      grep's paths and intentionally untouched).
- [ ] No behavioral change: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` stay green.

Files: `.github/workflows/test.yml`, `.github/workflows/external-integration.yml`,
`src/rebar/_commands/leaf.py`, `src/rebar/_commands/_seam.py`,
`src/rebar/_commands/__init__.py`.
compiled_state.title: P1: Purge stale bash-engine language from CI comments & leaf.py docstring
